meta.description: A non-official Apple-inspired design system. Built around system typography, layered materials, neo-glassmorphism, and modular bento storytelling.

reset.snippet: @layer reset { *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; } html, body { min-height: 100%; } img, picture, video, canvas, svg { display: block; max-width: 100%; } button, input, textarea, select { font: inherit; } }

base.responsibility: Theme, root variables, typography, document-level elements

utility.responsibility: Helpers, animations, responsive utilities, state toggles

darkModeRule.description: Dark mode preserves hue and chroma identity; only lightness changes.

optionalChaining.description: Use ?. when traversing optional DOM/state/data references

nullishCoalescing.description: Use ?? / ??= for null or undefined fallback only

destructuring.description: Use destructuring for dataset, options, event payloads, and state access

defaultingRule.description: Use ?? instead of || when false, 0, and empty string are valid values

domAccess.rule: Optional chaining must be used when queried elements may not exist.

datasetAccess.rule: Prefer destructuring from dataset with nullish fallback.

immutableUpdate.rule: Use spread syntax for state and collection updates.

arrayClone.rule: Avoid in-place mutation when updating UI state collections.

optionsMerge.rule: Merge user options with defaults using destructuring + spread.

nullishDefault.rule: Use ?? instead of || when 0, '', or false are valid.

color._description: Apple-inspired neutral-first palette with layered materials, system accent colors, and glass-specific semantics.

semantic._description: Purpose-driven assignments with glass and surface separation.

glassRegular.description: Readable glass for text-heavy functional UI

glassClear.description: Clear glass for media-rich or hero surfaces

rootVariables._description: All color variables emitted from :root using light-dark()

surfaceGlass.value: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-glass-highlight) 88%, transparent), color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-glass-regular) 100%, transparent))

surfaceGlassStrong.value: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-glass-highlight) 72%, transparent), color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-glass-clear) 100%, transparent))

glassSpecular.value: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in oklch, white 84%, transparent) 0%, color-mix(in oklch, white 24%, transparent) 42%, transparent 100%)

luxuryGlow.value: 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-accent) 18%, transparent), 0 10px 30px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-accent) 16%, transparent)

typography._description: System-first typography tuned to Apple-like hierarchy.

display.value: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Segoe UI', 'Inter', 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif

heading.value: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'SF Pro Display', 'Segoe UI', 'Inter', 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif

body.value: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Text', 'Segoe UI', 'Inter', 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif

mono.value: 'SF Mono', 'IBM Plex Mono', 'Source Code Pro', monospace

accent.value: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Rounded', 'SF Pro Text', 'Segoe UI', 'Inter', 'Noto Sans JP', sans-serif

serif.value: 'New York', 'Iowan Old Style', 'Noto Serif JP', serif

sm.value: 0 2px 12px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-glass-shadow) 70%, transparent), inset 0 1px 0 color-mix(in oklch, white 70%, transparent)

md.value: 0 8px 30px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-glass-shadow) 85%, transparent), inset 0 1px 0 color-mix(in oklch, white 68%, transparent)

lg.value: 0 12px 40px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-glass-shadow) 100%, transparent), inset 0 1px 0 color-mix(in oklch, white 64%, transparent)

xl.value: 0 18px 60px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-glass-shadow) 100%, transparent), inset 0 1px 0 color-mix(in oklch, white 60%, transparent)

gold.value: 0 6px 24px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-accent) 18%, transparent), 0 1px 6px color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-accent) 10%, transparent)

components._description: Component specifications with glass functional layers and bento-ready surfaces

formField._description: Shared styling contract for all input-like components

luxury.background: linear-gradient(135deg, color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary) 84%, white 12%), color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary) 100%, black 8%))

indicatorGapEnd.description: Extra room to the right of chevron-down icon

indicatorPaddingInlineEnd.description: Room for icon plus breathing space

media.background: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-surface) 36%, transparent), color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-background-elevated) 78%, transparent))

progressBar.luxuryFill: linear-gradient(90deg, color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary) 72%, white 8%), color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-primary) 100%, black 10%))

bentoTile._description: Base tile for marketing / dashboard bento layouts

bentoGlassTile._description: Glass tile for hero or floating bento surfaces

heroBentoTile._description: Large hero tile with clearer glass

mediaTile.background: linear-gradient(180deg, color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-surface) 36%, transparent), color-mix(in oklch, var(--color-background-elevated) 78%, transparent))

visible.description: All interactive elements show visible focus

offset.description: Focus ring uses halo instead of offset

prefersReducedTransparencyFallback.description: Replace glass backgrounds with surfaceElevated when transparency is reduced.

colorIndependence.description: Information not conveyed by color alone — always paired with icon, text, or pattern

darkModeGuidelines._description: Readable dark mode with restrained near-black surfaces.
darkModeGuidelines.backgroundStrategy: Use near-black surfaces with small lightness steps between layers.

textUsage.primary: Use for body copy and essential labels.
textUsage.secondary: Use for metadata and supporting labels.
textUsage.tertiary: Use for placeholders and low-priority chrome; never for body copy.

disabledStates._description: Disabled UI should remain legible and should not rely on opacity alone.

useOpacityOnly.description: Do not express disabled state by opacity reduction alone.

preserveReadableText.description: Disabled text must remain readable in both light and dark modes.

preserveVisibleBorders.description: Disabled inputs and controls must retain visible borders.

distinguishSelectedDisabled.description: Selected disabled controls must remain distinguishable from unselected disabled controls.
